arts.ttl: Greece vs. England: Carsley speaks out about injury withdrawals following bombshell Harry Kane interview
arts.sum: England manager Lee Carsley responds to Harry Kane's critical words aimed at his Three Lions teammates following the mass injury withdrawals earlier this week.

arts.ttl: Cole Palmer reveals frustration over bit-part role for England at Euro 2024 as Chelsea star pinpoints the exact moment he was left thinking: 'Why not me?'
arts.sum: Heading into the tournament, Palmer ended last season as arguably the most in-form player in the league after a run of 12 goals in 11 games - yet he failed to play a major role for England.

arts.ttl: Anthony Gordon heeds England’s call as no-shows undermine Lee Carsley | David Hytner
arts.sum: Newcastle winger says turning up for national team was never in doubt for him despite an injury before the camp According to Anthony Gordon, there was “no chance” he would miss out on the England squad because of injury, which has seemingly cast him as part of the minority. In the countdown to Thursday night’s potentially decisive Nations League tie against Greece in Athens – and the Wembley meeting with Republic of Ireland three days later – the interim manager, Lee Carsley, has been undermined by withdrawals, among other issues. There were an unprecedented eight on Monday, prompting a call for reinforcements and one of them – Jarrad Branthwaite, who was moved up from the under-21s – was unable to train fully and has not travelled, his place taken by the uncapped Jarell Quansah. So call it nine. And counting, because there is the fear that there will be more before the Ireland game. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Anthony Gordon keen to finally work with Thomas Tuchel after failed Chelsea move
arts.sum: Gordon made a big-money switch to St James’ Park from Everton in January 2023 having gone close to joining Chelsea the previous summer.

arts.ttl: Amid mass withdrawals and a must-win game, Carsley’s kids will determine his England legacy
arts.sum: The Three Lions face Greece in a crucial encounter with the interim manager forced to name a squad short of international experience

arts.ttl: Anthony Gordon reveals all on failed Chelsea move: ‘It was quite close, to be honest’
arts.sum: The Newcastle star was a target for the Blues during Tuchel’s reign at Stamford Bridge before staying with Everton until January 2023 when he moves to St James' Park

arts.ttl: Lee Carsley disputes Pep Guardiola claim over Jack Grealish’s fitness
arts.sum: Guardiola was perplexed at Grealish’s initial inclusion in the England squad after missing the last six Manchester City games

arts.ttl: Lee Carsley hits back at Pep Guardiola in Man City vs England row over Jack Grealish
arts.sum: Jack Grealish has pulled out of England's squad for the Nations League fixtures against Greece and Republic of Ireland but Pep Guardiola was furious his Manchester City midfielder was called up in the first place

arts.ttl: Lee Carsley vows England will go all-out attack vs Greece with 'no regrets' over defeat
arts.sum: England were stunned by Greece in a shock 2-1 defeat in the Nations League last month but Lee Carsley insists his side will throw caution to the wind in Athens in his penultimate match as manager

arts.ttl: England star Anthony Gordon makes shock admission about club he was 'desperate' to join
arts.sum: Newcastle United winger cannot wait to finally get the chance to work with Thomas Tuchel whose style of play should suit Gordon's sense of adventure
